examples: How can I bring myself, next New Year, to offer them miserable pellets of something indescribable?
An expression of indescribable happiness shone in her countenance, though tears were rolling down her cheeks.
"It's incredible, I was shocked after the match, it's a great feeling: indescribable, " Gulbis told reporters.
Being so connected to one of the people even facing that kind of choice is indescribable.
